ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stand_volume" (
  "stand_volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stand volume record */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species associated with the stand volume */,
  "total_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the total stand volume record */,
  "stand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forest stand */,
  "volume" REAL /* Stand volume value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the stand volume */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of measurement */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stand volume data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stand_volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stand_volume_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stand_volume_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stand_volume_stand_id FOREIGN KEY ("stand_id") REFERENCES forest_stands ("stand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stand_volume_total_id FOREIGN KEY ("total_id") REFERENCES total_stand_volume ("total_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the species */,
  "carbon_sequestration_rate" REAL /* Carbon sequestration rate of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_stand_volume" (
  "total_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each total stand volume record */,
  "stand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forest stand */,
  "volume" REAL /* Total stand volume value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the total stand volume */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of measurement */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the total stand volume data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_stand_volume_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_stand_volume_stand_id FOREIGN KEY ("stand_id") REFERENCES forest_stands ("stand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carbon_mass_vegetation" (
  "carbon_mass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each carbon mass record */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species associated with the carbon mass */,
  "total_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the total carbon mass record */,
  "stand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forest stand */,
  "mass" REAL /* Carbon mass value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the carbon mass */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of measurement */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the carbon mass data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carbon_mass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carbon_mass_vegetation_stand_id FOREIGN KEY ("stand_id") REFERENCES forest_stands ("stand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carbon_mass_vegetation_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carbon_mass_vegetation_total_id FOREIGN KEY ("total_id") REFERENCES total_stand_volume ("total_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carbon_mass_vegetation_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carbon_mass_aboveground_vegetation" (
  "carbon_mass_aboveground_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each carbon mass record */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species associated with the carbon mass */,
  "total_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the total carbon mass record */,
  "stand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forest stand */,
  "mass" REAL /* Carbon mass value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the carbon mass */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of measurement */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the carbon mass data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carbon_mass_aboveground_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carbon_mass_aboveground_vegetation_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carbon_mass_aboveground_vegetation_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carbon_mass_aboveground_vegetation_total_id FOREIGN KEY ("total_id") REFERENCES total_stand_volume ("total_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carbon_mass_aboveground_vegetation_stand_id FOREIGN KEY ("stand_id") REFERENCES forest_stands ("stand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carbon_mass_belowground_vegetation" (
  "carbon_mass_belowground_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each carbon mass record */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species associated with the carbon mass */,
  "total_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the total carbon mass record */,
  "stand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forest stand */,
  "mass" REAL /* Carbon mass value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the carbon mass */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of measurement */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the carbon mass data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carbon_mass_belowground_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carbon_mass_belowground_vegetation_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carbon_mass_belowground_vegetation_total_id FOREIGN KEY ("total_id") REFERENCES total_stand_volume ("total_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carbon_mass_belowground_vegetation_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carbon_mass_belowground_vegetation_stand_id FOREIGN KEY ("stand_id") REFERENCES forest_stands ("stand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carbon_mass_litter_pool" (
  "carbon_mass_litter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each carbon mass record */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species associated with the carbon mass */,
  "total_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the total carbon mass record */,
  "stand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forest stand */,
  "mass" REAL /* Carbon mass value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the carbon mass */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of measurement */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the carbon mass data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carbon_mass_litter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carbon_mass_litter_pool_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carbon_mass_litter_pool_total_id FOREIGN KEY ("total_id") REFERENCES total_stand_volume ("total_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carbon_mass_litter_pool_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carbon_mass_litter_pool_stand_id FOREIGN KEY ("stand_id") REFERENCES forest_stands ("stand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carbon_mass_soil_pool" (
  "carbon_mass_soil_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each carbon mass record */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species associated with the carbon mass */,
  "total_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the total carbon mass record */,
  "stand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forest stand */,
  "mass" REAL /* Carbon mass value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the carbon mass */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of measurement */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the carbon mass data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carbon_mass_soil_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carbon_mass_soil_pool_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carbon_mass_soil_pool_stand_id FOREIGN KEY ("stand_id") REFERENCES forest_stands ("stand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carbon_mass_soil_pool_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carbon_mass_soil_pool_total_id FOREIGN KEY ("total_id") REFERENCES total_stand_volume ("total_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forest_stands" (
  "stand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forest stand */,
  "stand_name" TEXT /* Name of the forest stand */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the forest stand */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the forest stand */,
  "date_established" TEXT /* Date the stand was established */,
  "last_measured_date" TEXT /* Last date the stand was measured */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forest stand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forest_stands_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., field measurement, remote sensing, modeling) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the data */,
  "stand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forest stand accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stand_id FOREIGN KEY ("stand_id") REFERENCES forest_stands ("stand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data validation */,
  "stand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forest stand validated */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of validation */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the validation */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of validation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on the validation process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_stand_id FOREIGN KEY ("stand_id") REFERENCES forest_stands ("stand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "stand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forest stand versioned */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of versioning */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the versioning */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of versioning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_stand_id FOREIGN KEY ("stand_id") REFERENCES forest_stands ("stand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic */,
  "stand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forest stand analyzed */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source analyzed */,
  "analytic_date" TEXT /* Date of analysis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the analysis */,
  "analytic_result" TEXT /* Result of analysis */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on the analysis process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_stand_id FOREIGN KEY ("stand_id") REFERENCES forest_stands ("stand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modeling_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modeling output */,
  "stand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forest stand modeled */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source modeled */,
  "output_date" TEXT /* Date of modeling */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the modeling */,
  "output_result" TEXT /* Result of modeling */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on the modeling process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modeling_outputs_stand_id FOREIGN KEY ("stand_id") REFERENCES forest_stands ("stand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modeling_outputs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modeling_outputs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
